name: meituan-living-assistant
description: Meituan living deals assistant — one-click coupon collection, nearby group-buy food search and ordering, daily deals exploration for dining, coffee, milk tea, hotpot and more.

displayDescription.en: Helps you collect all types of Meituan coupons with one tap, search nearby group-buy food and place orders, explore daily deals and save money across dining and lifestyle services.
displayDescription.zh: 帮您一键领取美团优惠券，搜索附近团购美食并下单，探索今日活动，覆盖餐饮饮品等生活服务，省钱省心。
